### Post by Deepak_patil on 2015-06-04
Ubuntu 14.04 installed successfully alongside windows 8.1 but unable to boot ubuntu 

As per this post --> [https://help.ubuntu.com/community/Boot-Repair](https://help.ubuntu.com/community/Boot-Repair) 
I think I have some problem in grub installation ... Boot-repair tool generates boot-info summary as,

"grub-pc purge cancelled." and the link specifying the error generated by the same tool is [http://paste.ubuntu.com/11565598/](http://paste.ubuntu.com/11565598/)

Can you provide me any solution such that I can operate the ubuntu os?

---

### Post by grahammechanical on 2015-06-04
It seems to me that Grub (Linux boot loader) is installed into a partition (sda5) and it is the same partition that Ubuntu is install in. Therefore, it would seem that the motherboard is loading the Windows boot loader and not Grub.

Boot repair is unable to purge the Grub in sda5 and reinstall it into the MBR of sda because there is no internet connection

> The default repair of the Boot-Repair utility will purge (in order to) and reinstall the grub2 of sda5 into the MBR of sda.

Notice all those "failed to fetch" error messages?

> E: Failed to fetch [http://in.archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu/pool/main/g/grub2/grub-pc_2.02~beta2-9ubuntu1.2_amd64.deb](http://in.archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu/pool/main/g/grub2/grub-pc_2.02~beta2-9ubuntu1.2_amd64.deb)  Could not connect to in.archive.ubuntu.com:80 (2001:67c:1360:8c01::19). - connect (113: No route to host) [IP: 2001:67c:1360:8c01::19 80]

E: Failed to fetch [http://in.archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu/pool/main/g/grub2/grub-pc-bin_2.02~beta2-9ubuntu1.2_amd64.deb](http://in.archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu/pool/main/g/grub2/grub-pc-bin_2.02~beta2-9ubuntu1.2_amd64.deb)  Unable to connect to in.archive.ubuntu.com:http: [IP: 2001:67c:1360:8c01::19 80]

E: Failed to fetch [http://in.archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu/pool/main/g/grub2/grub2-common_2.02~beta2-9ubuntu1.2_amd64.deb](http://in.archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu/pool/main/g/grub2/grub2-common_2.02~beta2-9ubuntu1.2_amd64.deb)  Unable to connect to in.archive.ubuntu.com:http: [IP: 2001:67c:1360:8c01::19 80]
